headline: VHT Lagged the Market by 57 Points Over 5 Years. Here Is Why Long-Term Investors Still Hold It
summary: Healthcare spending doesn’t stop during recessions. That structural reality is the core argument for owning Vanguard Health Care ETF (NYSEARCA:VHT), a pure-play sector fund that has quietly compounded wealth for long-term investors while offering insulation from economic cycles that most equity sectors can’t match. headline: Eli Lilly Pediatric EBGLYSS Data Counters Weak Momentum And Valuation Concerns
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) reported strong positive topline Phase 3 results for EBGLYSS (lebrikizumab-lbkz) in pediatric patients with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis. The trial met its primary and key secondary endpoints for efficacy and safety, with meaningful improvements in disease severity and itch. The safety profile in children was consistent with previous studies, supporting potential label expansion into younger age groups. These results reinforce Eli Lilly's focus on growing its...

headline: Wave Plunges More Than 50% After Obesity Shot Falls Short
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Wave Life Sciences Ltd. shares plunged their most on record after a single, higher-dose shot of its weight-loss drug failed to meet investor expectations for reducing visceral fat.The medicine, known as WVE-007, is intended to be used as a less-frequent treatment to help people shed pounds without losing muscle, a known risk with the blockbuster obesity drugs sold by Novo Nordisk A/S and Eli Lilly & Co.
